title: Daily Trend Scan
summary: Added 5 fresh TikTok content angles spanning missed reply guilt, mom texting patterns, group chat avoidance, and wholesome accountability.
contextSummary: Backlog had 5 ideas; 2 designed carousels, 1 in research, 1 script-ready, 1 idea. New batch leans into visual/escalation formats (timestamp progression, notification badges, typing indicators) and one soft-sell streak piece to bridge humor → product.
